summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features: Line KPIs with configurable windows, per-user UI preferences (sidebar reordering + icon colors), admin branding (accent color + logo upload), and UI styling updates (pure black background + outlined buttons). All backend APIs and frontend components working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/control-room/line-kpis with hours=8,24,168 returns correct structure with lines, availability, downtime, sections
Backend: Invalid hours parameters (0, 200) correctly rejected with 422 status
Backend: GET/PUT /api/users/me/ui-prefs persists sidebar_order and icon_colors per user
Backend: UI prefs validation rejects invalid hex colors and duplicate module keys
Backend: Tech and admin users have independent UI preferences
Backend: PUT /api/branding validates accent hex color, rejects invalid formats
Backend: POST /api/branding/logo uploads small PNG, returns data URI
Backend: Logo upload rejects oversized files (>500KB) and non-image types
Backend: DELETE /api/branding/logo removes logo successfully
Backend: Admin original UI prefs restored after testing
Backend: Branding accent restored to #00fff5
Frontend: Login successful with admin/admin123
Frontend: Line KPI ribbon displays with 7 line cards (PC21, PC32, PC36, KKR, TWZ, BCP, etc)
Frontend: Window selector buttons (8h, 24h, 168h) present and functional
Frontend: Clicking line card expands section KPI panel with per-section breakdown
Frontend: Section panel shows 'Filter twin' button
Frontend: Plant totals toggle present, expands/collapses totals strip
Frontend: Sidebar customize toggle enters/exits customize mode
Frontend: Customize mode shows 9 color input pickers for nav icons
Frontend: Administration page loads, System tab accessible
Frontend: Branding section shows accent hex input, color picker, logo upload
Frontend: Body background is pure black rgb(0,0,0)
Frontend: Buttons have outlined style (transparent background, 1px border)
Frontend: Navigation between Control Room and Administration works
Frontend: No console errors or error messages on page
